explicit_payout_filters.pass_rule: public issue or Algora page shows an explicit bounty amount before work starts
explicit_payout_filters.reject_rule: payout is implied, stale, private, or hidden behind login

explicit_payout_filters.pass_rule: bounty is open and issue is not solved, claimed, or merged
claim count is low or claim rules protect effort
explicit_payout_filters.reject_rule: many visible claims and no reservation

explicit_payout_filters.pass_rule: maintainer or bounty owner has a clear review path and recent activity
explicit_payout_filters.reject_rule: repo abandoned or payout owner unclear

explicit_payout_filters.pass_rule: local reproduction and tests can prove completion before public action
explicit_payout_filters.reject_rule: requires credentials, paid services, private data, or undefined acceptance

candidate_rows.public_signal: completed page shows 25 completed bounties and bounty creation mechanism
candidate_rows.risk: no current open bounty on this page
